name: Dune
description: Layered sand mounds rolling along the bottom of every cell — crests rise, fall and lean with each new seed.

code.style: --sand: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --h: @rand(18%, 96%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -2%; right: -2%; bottom: 0; height: var(--h); background: var(--sand); border-radius: @rand(40%, 100%) @rand(40%, 100%) 0 0; opacity: 0.88; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
